metadata.title: Born in the U.S.A.
metadata.lyrics:
[00:18.01] Born down in a dead man's town
[00:21.37] The first kick I took was when I hit the ground
[00:25.59] End up like a dog that's been beat too much
[00:28.79] 'Til you spend half your life just to cover it up now
[00:34.00] Born in the USA
[00:37.02] I was born in the USA
[00:40.93] I was born in the USA
[00:45.98] Born in the USA, now
[00:49.95] Got in a little hometown jam
[00:53.84] So they put a rifle in my hands
[00:57.70] Send me off to a foreign land
[01:01.59] To go and kill the yellow man
[01:05.72] Born in the USA
[01:08.78] I was born in the USA
[01:13.56] Born in the USA
[01:16.62] I was born in the USA
[01:21.21] Come back home to the refinery
[01:24.32] Hiring man said, "Son, if it was up to me"
[01:29.49] Went down to see my V.A. man
[01:32.37] He said, "Son, don't you understand, now?"
[01:39.95] Oh, yeah
[01:43.74] No, no
[01:47.71] No, no, no
[01:52.45] I had a brother at Khe Sanh
[01:56.50] Fightin' off them Viet Cong
[02:00.28] They're still there, he's all gone
[02:07.86] He had a woman he loved in Saigon
[02:11.88] I got a picture of him in her arms now
[02:23.35] Down in the shadow of the penitentiary
[02:26.58] Out by the gas fires of the refinery
[02:30.92] I'm ten years burnin' down the road
[02:35.46] Nowhere to run, ain't got nowhere to go
[02:39.66] Born in the USA
[02:42.71] I was born in the USA, oh
[02:47.65] Born in the USA
[02:50.35] I'm a long-gone daddy in the USA, now
[02:55.53] Born in the USA
[02:59.48] Born in the USA
[03:03.34] Born in the USA
[03:06.09] I'm a cool rocking daddy in the USA, now
[03:11.02]
